summary: Iteration 50: Verified 4 issues. Backend APIs for all features working correctly. Fixed React hooks violation in notifications.tsx. Frontend tunnel (ngrok) intermittently down due to infrastructure issues.

integration_issues.issue: Expo ngrok tunnel intermittently fails with 'ngrok tunnel took too long to connect' errors. This is infrastructure-related, not code.

issue_1_admin_planning.details: GET /api/admin/vehicle-schedule returns vehicles with reservations. For Feb 2026: BMW Serie 3 320d has 1 reservation (Feb 20-25), Mercedes-Benz Classe C 200 has 1 reservation (Feb 15-22)

issue_2_document_upload.details: Upload endpoints exist: POST /api/auth/upload-id-b64, /api/auth/upload-id-back-b64, /api/auth/upload-license-b64, /api/auth/upload-license-back-b64. Profile.tsx has UI for Pièce d'Identité (Recto/Verso) and Permis de Conduire (Recto/Verso) at lines 360-471

issue_3_calendar_booking.details: reservations.tsx CalendarView component (lines 152-358) handles date selection. When date has no reservations and is in future, shows 'Réserver un véhicule' button via data-testid='cal-book-vehicle-btn'
issue_3_calendar_booking.frontend_code_lines: reservations.tsx lines 152-358, particularly 310-318 for booking button

issue_4_notifications.details: GET /api/notifications returns 2 notifications for client jean.dupont@gmail.com (BMW and Mercedes reservations)
issue_4_notifications.fix_details: Moved useEffect and useCallback BEFORE conditional return to fix hooks violation

api_verification_results.admin_login: POST /api/admin/login - Returns 200 with access_token for admin-geneva@logirent.ch
api_verification_results.client_login: POST /api/auth/login - Returns 200 with access_token for jean.dupont@gmail.com
api_verification_results.vehicle_schedule: GET /api/admin/vehicle-schedule - Returns 6 vehicles, 2 with reservations for Feb 2026
api_verification_results.notifications: GET /api/notifications - Returns 2 notifications for test client

action_items: Frontend tunnel (ngrok) intermittently failing - may need to wait for tunnel to stabilize or restart expo service
All 4 features appear to be correctly implemented based on code review and backend API verification
critical_code_review_comments: Fixed React hooks violation in notifications.tsx - hooks must be called before any conditional returns
GanttChart.tsx correctly iterates vehicle.reservations to display Gantt bars
profile.tsx has document upload UI with data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.frontend: Unable to fully verify due to ngrok tunnel issues, code review confirms implementations

seed_data_creation: 2 test reservations for client jean.dupont@gmail.com: BMW Feb 20-25, Mercedes Feb 15-22. 2 corresponding notifications created.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend APIs all working. Expo ngrok tunnel has intermittent connectivity issues ('ngrok tunnel took too long to connect'). Fixed React hooks violation in notifications.tsx. The frontend when loaded shows the admin login page correctly with email/password fields and 'Se connecter' button.

rca_of_issues.notifications_blank_page: RCA: React hooks (useEffect, useCallback) were being called AFTER a conditional return statement (auth guard). This violates React's Rules of Hooks. Fix: Moved all hooks before the conditional return, wrapped fetchNotifications in useEffect dependency on isAuthenticated.
rca_of_issues.ngrok_tunnel_issues: Infrastructure issue - ngrok tunnel timeout errors are external to the application code. Expo keeps restarting due to tunnel failures.
